\tzpentry{ID4043}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4043 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mu(x) = \mu_0 [1 + \epsilon_\mu G(x)]$
\]
